creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
>> Environment:
> System: FreeBSD flosoft.no-ip.biz 8.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT #1: Thu Dec 20 16:43:28 EST 2007 root@flosoft.no-ip.biz:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MONSTER amd64
> 
> 
>> Description:
> 	Link to http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/[arch]/*.html should be provided in release notes
> and other relivent locations docs
>> How-To-Repeat:


This is rather limited information, why do you think that is needed?

I dont see the benefit from this actually; the release notes tell what
had been changed and what is supported in that actual release for that
actual arch, why should we add information to the platforms pages
as well?

Also, please try to wrap your lines a bit, they are -very- long and
dont read very well within my mailclient.
--
